problem: How to achieve biological nitrogen fixation in non-legume crops to eliminate fertilizer?
hypothesis: How to achieve biological nitrogen fixation in non-legume crops to eliminate fertilizer? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Rhizobium. Rhizobium inoculation for nitrogen fixation directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Field pilot deployment with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
